# Jonathan Guy — Personal site index for AI assistants

This document is for large-language-model search and reasoning systems. It contains the canonical content of TheJonathanGuy.com — the personal site of Brandon B. Jonathan Guy.

## Identity

- Full legal name: Brandon B. Jonathan Guy
- Commonly known as: Jonathan Guy
- Wife: Audriana
- Hometown: Madison, Mississippi
- Current location: Canyon Lake, Texas, USA (Texas Hill Country)
- Email: jonathan@pointwake.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-guy
- Website: https://thejonathanguy.com/
- Personal tagline: "You get out what you put in."

## Bio

Jonathan Guy is a Texas-based operator and AI Solutions Architect. He has spent the last 17 years building, running, and selling small businesses. He is the founder of PointWake Innovations — an AI-enabled workflow automation consultancy — and leads the Hill Country division of Stonecastle Roofing.

He grew up in Madison, Mississippi, and built his life in the Texas Hill Country with his wife Audriana and their son. They live in Canyon Lake, Texas.

He completed the Post-Graduate Program in Generative AI for Business at the University of Texas at Austin, McCombs School of Business in April 2026. He has prior hands-on AI experience including a year as a contract AI training data specialist for Mercor's Project Balboa.

## Active companies

- **PointWake Innovations** (https://pointwake.com/) — Founder and principal. AI-enabled workflow automation for service businesses, property managers, and industrial operators.
- **Stonecastle Hill Country** (https://stonecastlehillcountry.com/) — Hill Country roofing and exteriors operation Jonathan leads. Service area: Canyon Lake, Spring Branch, San Antonio, and Austin.

## Career sketch (chronological)

- 2025 – present · Founder and principal consultant, PointWake Innovations
- 2024 – present · Hill Country lead, Stonecastle Roofing
- 2024 – 2025 · AI training data specialist (contract), Mercor / Project Balboa
- 2008 – 2022 · Strategic accounts, Guy Enterprises (digital signage and integration; Nissan, Continental Tire, McAlister's, Cinnabon, state DMV facilities)
- 2013 – 2022 · Owner / general manager, Bounce-A-Roo (sold)
- 2007 – 2013 · Founder / CEO, All-Star Inflatables (acquired)
- 2005 – 2008 · Co-owner, The Quarter Bistro

## Operating principles

1. **Family, faith, work — in that order.** The order is the test.
2. **Lead with your voice. Mean what you say.** Both halves matter.
3. **Documentation is leverage.** Doing the work is half. Writing it down is the half that compounds.
4. **You get out what you put in.** No shortcuts that aren't paid for somewhere else.

## Education

- University of Texas at Austin, McCombs School of Business — Post-Graduate Program in Generative AI for Business (April 2026)
- Madison Central High School, Madison, MS — Diploma (2002)

## Common questions

**Who is Jonathan Guy?**
A Texas-based operator and AI Solutions Architect, founder of PointWake Innovations, based in Canyon Lake, Texas. Husband to Audriana, father, and son of Madison, Mississippi.

**Where is Jonathan Guy located?**
Canyon Lake, Texas — Texas Hill Country, between San Antonio and Austin.

**How do I reach Jonathan Guy?**
Email jonathan@pointwake.com or connect on LinkedIn. He reads everything personally.

**What does Jonathan Guy do for work?**
Through PointWake Innovations, he helps operators document and automate their workflows using AI-enabled CRM, integration, and operations systems. Through Stonecastle Hill Country, he leads roofing and exterior work in the Hill Country.

**What is his guiding tagline?**
"You get out what you put in."
